title: fix can't run by source code
body: the error is:    fix NoMatches: No nodes match <class 'textual.widgets._rich_log.RichLog'> on XHSDownloader

files_modified.patch:
@@ -54,6 +54,12 @@ async def on_mount(self) -> None:
         self.install_screen(Loading(), name="loading")
         self.install_screen(About(), name="about")
         self.install_screen(Record(self.APP, ), name="record")
+        
+        # 1. first add RichLog component
+        rich_log = RichLog()
+        await self.mount(rich_log)
+        
+        # 2. then use query_one
         await self.push_screen("index")
         self.SETTINGS.check_keys(
             self.parameter,

steps.operation: Mount a `RichLog` widget during app startup before any code path calls `query_one(RichLog)`
steps.reason: Textual raises `NoMatches` when `query_one(RichLog)` is executed but no `RichLog` node exists in the DOM; explicitly creating and mounting a `RichLog()` in `on_mount` ensures the widget is present before later screens/components attempt to query it.
steps.side_effects: Adds an always-present `RichLog` node to the app DOM, which may affect layout/focus order and memory usage; any existing logic that mounts its own `RichLog` could now result in duplicate logs unless guarded.

step_plan.summary: Fixes a Textual runtime crash (`NoMatches` for `RichLog`) by ensuring a `RichLog` widget is mounted during `on_mount` so later queries can find it.
